title: Cribl Source
description: A Cribl data input source that collects events from various systems and protocols for processing through pipelines and delivery to destinations.

type.description: The source type that determines the collection protocol and configuration options

disabled.description: Whether the source is disabled and not actively collecting data

host.description: The host or IP address to listen on for network-based sources

port.description: The port number to listen on for network-based sources

authType.description: The authentication method required for incoming connections

authToken.description: The authentication token required for token-based authentication

pipeline.description: The pipeline identifier to route events from this source to

description.description: A human-readable description of the source purpose

environment.description: The environment context tag applied to events from this source

streamtags.description: Tags applied to all events collected from this source

maxConnections.description: Maximum number of concurrent connections for network sources

enableProxyHeader.description: Whether to honor proxy protocol headers

certPath.description: Path to the TLS certificate file

privKeyPath.description: Path to the TLS private key file

caPath.description: Path to the CA certificate for client verification
